label: 1169_trairatvorakul_prasarn trairatvorakul_prasarn_bank thailand
description: Dr Prasarn Trairatvorakul, Governor of the Bank of Thailand, discussed economic challenges and financial policies in speeches on positioning Thailand for growth, connecting to new investment frontiers, and managing risks from global economic conditions.
